subcodes.first_line: O true trustee, your letter was examined and its contents were understood. The divine friends in those regions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین حقیقی مکتوب شما ملاحظه گردید و مضمون مفهوم شد یاران الهی در آن سامان
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
